ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Question {title: 'How to query Neo4j'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(tag1:Tag {name: 'cypher'})-[:TAGGED]->(tag2:Tag {name: 'database'}),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:ASKED]->(user1:User {display_name: 'Neo4jAdmin'}),
    p3 = (a)-[r3:ANSWERED]->(answer1:Answer {title: 'Cypher Best Practices'})-[:PROVIDED]->(user2:User {display_name: 'DataExplorer'})-[:COMMENTED]->(comment1:Comment {score: 5})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What are the most common database-related tags used alongside the question "How to query Neo4j" and how does DataExplorer’s response on best practices compare with the community’s engagement score?

cypher:
MATCH (q:Question {title: "How to query Neo4j"})-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag),       (a:Answer {title: "DataExplorer's response on best practices"})-[:ANSWERED]->(q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment)
WITH t, c
RETURN t.name AS TagName, COUNT(c) AS CommentCount
ORDER BY CommentCount DESC
